creator: adam@nine.net
text:
4.0-release install panics during probing of devices.  The exact message I get is "panic: nexus_setup_intr: NULL irq resource!".  The install then stops and reboots.

How-To-Repeat: I imagine the problem is hardware related because I have installed 4.0-release on other machines.  The machine this problem occurs on is a PentiumII 333Mhz, 64mb ram, 3 IDE devices, (HD, CDRW, DVDROM).  The maker of the machine is Packard Bell.  I have run FreeBSD since 2.2.8 on this machine without any problems.
